description: Allow all authenticated users to read and search general user identities.
policy: permit(principal, action in [Action::"get /api/users/search", Action::"get /api/users/{sub}", Action::"post /api/users/bulk"], resource) when { principal.groups.contains("Student") || principal.groups.contains("Reviewer") || principal.groups.contains("ExaminationOfficer") || principal.groups.contains("Admin") };

description: Allow Admin and ExaminationOfficer to manage groups and user attributes.
policy: permit(principal, action in [Action::"get /api/users/groups/{groupName}/members", Action::"post /api/users/groups/{groupName}/members", Action::"delete /api/users/groups/{groupName}/members/{username}", Action::"get /api/users/{username}/details", Action::"patch /api/users/groups/{groupName}/members/{username}/attributes"], resource) when { principal.groups.contains("Admin") || principal.groups.contains("ExaminationOfficer") };
